emails.subject: Clarksdale
emails.body: Kay Could you forward me e-versions of (1) the completed one month Clarksdale transaction, (2) the draft transaction document you feel is the best template from the point of view of the seller of the marketing services and (3) the finalized term sheet, if there was one, before the parties started to work on the definitive agreement relating to Clarksdale? My 'Virginia garbage burners' transaction has awakened, with negotiations occurring tomorrow. Thanks, David

emails.subject: Clarksdale
emails.body: Kay Could you forward me e-versions of (1) the completed one month Clarksdale transaction, (2) the draft transaction document you feel is the best template from the point of view of the seller of the marketing services and (3) the finalized term sheet, if there was one, before the parties started to work on the definitive agreement relating to Clarksdale? My 'Virginia garbage burners' transaction has awakened, with negotiations occurring tomorrow. Thanks, David

emails.subject: Re: Clarksdale
emails.body: Re: Clarksdale I was in Clarksdale yesterday, and have a dr's appt this am, but will be glad to give you what I have. In fact, I could use some help with the EEI if the offer is still good. Maybe you could just talk me through it. Thanks, Kay David Portz@ECT 06/04/2001 01:16 PM

emails.subject: Re: Clarksdale
emails.body: I'll be glad to help. I may be pulled into negotiations starting at noon on this garbage burner deal. Kay Mann@ENRON 06/05/2001 06:22 AM
